LanguageData.NCL_WaitWorm.label: ArchoWorm Incoming
LanguageData.NCL_WaitWorm.description: An archoWorm unit will be deployed to your primary colony. If you abandon the colony before its arrival, you will permanently forfeit this archomechanical specimen.
LanguageData.NCL_WaitWorm.letterText: The deployed archoWorm has arrived at your colony. Prepare for acquisition procedures.
LanguageData.NCL_WaitWormFight.label: ArchoWorm Trial Imminent
LanguageData.NCL_WaitWormFight.description: An archoWorm combat unit is en route to your primary colony. Abandoning the colony prior to engagement will be considered trial failure.
LanguageData.NCL_WaitWormFight.letterText: The archoWorm trial unit has reached your perimeter. Assume combat positions - this mechanoid requires subjugation through force.
